rationale: Review 2’s main placement finding is confirmed by the diff: the public API is generic bialgebra/Hopf-algebra convolution infrastructure, not algebraic-group infrastructure, so moving/splitting it would produce a better-placed PR. Review 1 catches a real smaller namespace/private-helper issue, but acting only on that would leave the broader placement problem unresolved; Review 2’s PR-description finding is not confirmable from the shown diff and is not decisive.
